workbook_idworkbook_nameis_consultantcustom_sql_idCustom SQL queries
7f0d75b3-a9b1-a75e-5fd7-bc6af9878911Sample 1TRUE2f962613-9d1d-04c0-94eb-7455b84c8f47WITH regional_sales AS (
SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue
FROM orders GROUP BY region),
top_regions AS (
SELECT region FROM regional_sales
WHERE total_revenue > 10000)
SELECT
r.region,
r.total_revenue
FROM regional_sales r
JOIN top_regions t ON r.region = t.region;
7f0d75b3-a9b1-a75e-5fd7-bc6af9878911Sample 1TRUE3e819bd5-7791-9169-5689-11216d8c6afaWITH dept_avg AS (
SELECT dept_id, AVG(salary) AS avg_sal
FROM employees GROUP BY dept_id),
high_earners AS (
SELECT e.name, e.salary, d.avg_sal
FROM employees e JOIN dept_avg d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id)
SELECT name, salary
FROM high_earners
WHERE salary > avg_sal
ORDER BY salary DESC;
